title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreational opportunities including an aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, and youth and adult sports. Provides preschool and afterschool child care programs. 685 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-9:30pm, Saturday 7am-7pm, Sunday 1pm-6:30pm Email (503) 399-2788 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 399-2788 Youth Development Felicia Fisher [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9:30pm, Saturday 7am-7pm, Sunday 1pm-6:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Cottage Street and Court Street in downtown Salem. Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - COURT CARE DROP IN CHILD CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
